MANAGE_AVATAR_SETTINGS.title: Manage Avatar Settings
MANAGE_AVATAR_SETTINGS.description: Can configure avatar plugin settings such as allowed sources, file types, and size limits.

MANAGE_PLAYER_AVATAR.title: Manage Player Avatars
MANAGE_PLAYER_AVATAR.description: Can change player profile avatars from the player detail page.

settings.title: Avatar Settings
